info.title: Open Self Service REST API
info.description: Complete REST API reference for the Open Self Service harmonization layer. This API provides a unified interface to interact with various backend systems including CMS, ticketing, notifications, billing, e-commerce, and more. All endpoints return normalized data models regardless of the underlying integration.

servers.description: Base URL for requests (you can change it to your API, e.g. staging or localhost).

createdAt.description: Section creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

createdAt.description: Article creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

createdAt.description: Ticket creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

total.description: Total number of tickets matching the query

fields.description: Optional map of additional custom fields.

createdAt.description: Notification creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

total.description: Total number of notifications matching the query

isActive.description: Whether the organization is currently active

total.description: Total number of organizations matching the query

values.description: Available values for this option group

options.description: Selected option values for this variant

inStock.description: Whether this variant is in stock

resources.description: Resources associated with this billing account

total.description: Total number of billing accounts matching the query

startDate.description: Contract start date in ISO 8601 format

endDate.description: Contract end date in ISO 8601 format

total.description: Total number of products matching the query

endOfWarranty.description: Warranty end date in ISO 8601 format

issuedDate.description: Invoice issue date in ISO 8601 format

paymentDueDate.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 format

total.description: Total number of invoices matching the query

createdAt.description: Category creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

createdAt.description: Article creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

hits.description: Search result hits (structure depends on search index)

total.description: Total price for this line item

createdAt.description: Document creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

dueDate.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 format

createdAt.description: Order creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

paymentDueDate.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

total.description: Order total including tax and shipping

subtotal.description: Order subtotal before tax and shipping

purchaseOrderNumber.description: Purchase order number for B2B orders

email.description: Customer email for guest order confirmation

total.description: Total number of orders matching the query
Total number of items in cart

createdAt.description: Cart creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

expiresAt.description: Cart expiration timestamp in ISO 8601 format

subtotal.description: Cart subtotal before discounts and shipping

customerId.description: Optional customer identifier for authenticated user cart binding.

regionId.description: Region identifier used by commerce backend.

locale.description: Optional locale provided in the request body (kept as string).
Optional locale provided in the request body (kept as string).

cartId.description: Existing cart identifier. If omitted, implementation may create/find active cart.

variantId.description: Optional integration-specific variant identifier (e.g. Medusa variant UUID).

currency.description: Currency code (typically required when a new cart is created).

regionId.description: Region identifier (typically required when a new cart is created).

locale.description: Optional locale provided in the request body (kept as string).
Optional locale provided in the request body (kept as string).
Optional locale provided in the request body (kept as string).

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default address

createdAt.description: Address creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

updatedAt.description: Last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format

total.description: Total number of addresses matching the query

label.description: Optional address label visible in UI (for example `Home`, `Office`).

isDefault.description: When true, sets the new address as default.

label.description: Optional address label visible in UI.

isDefault.description: When true, sets the updated address as default.

isEnabled.description: Whether this provider is currently enabled

requiresRedirect.description: True when provider requires redirect flow (e.g., hosted checkout)

cartId.description: Cart identifier used to create payment session context.

providerId.description: Payment provider identifier selected by user.

returnUrl.description: Return URL for successful/finished payment flow.

cancelUrl.description: Optional return URL for canceled payment flow.

redirectUrl.description: Redirect target URL for redirect-based providers

clientSecret.description: Client secret/token for embedded payment forms

expiresAt.description: Session expiration timestamp in ISO 8601 format

returnUrl.description: Updated return URL for successful/finished payment flow.

cancelUrl.description: Updated return URL for canceled payment flow.

shippingAddressId.description: Saved shipping address identifier for authenticated users.

billingAddressId.description: Saved billing address identifier for authenticated users.

email.description: Customer email, typically required for guest checkout.

shippingOptionId.description: Shipping option identifier returned by shipping options endpoint.

returnUrl.description: URL used for redirect after successful payment flow.

cancelUrl.description: Optional URL used for redirect when payment flow is canceled.

total.description: Total number of available shipping options

email.description: Customer email, required for guest checkout when not set earlier.

paymentRedirectUrl.description: Redirect URL for external payment flow

shippingAddressId.description: Saved shipping address identifier for authenticated users.

shippingAddress.description: Inline shipping address payload (required for guest checkout).

billingAddressId.description: Saved billing address identifier for authenticated users.

billingAddress.description: Inline billing address payload (required for guest checkout).

returnUrl.description: URL used for redirect after successful payment flow.

cancelUrl.description: Optional URL used for redirect when payment flow is canceled.

email.description: Customer email required for guest checkout.
